summary: Phase 1 Design System validation. Tested: CSS variables active, theme toggle (dark/light), login inline error, ARIA labels, text contrast, and no regressions on key pages. All Phase 1 features verified working. One minor bug fixed (login error message). One design issue found: light mode incomplete due to hardcoded inline styles in DashboardLayout.

ui_bugs.issue: Main wrapper div and <main> element have hardcoded `style={{ background: '#0F1720' }}` inline styles. When light mode is activated, body/header/sidebar correctly update (they use CSS vars) but the main content container stays dark #0F1720. Fix: change to `style={{ background: 'var(--biqc-bg)' }}` on lines 252 and 495.

issues: DashboardLayout line 252: `style={{ background: '#0F1720', color: '#F4F7FA' }}` should be `style={{ background: 'var(--biqc-bg)', color: 'var(--biqc-text)' }}`
DashboardLayout line 495: `style={{ background: '#0F1720' }}` (main element) should use `var(--biqc-bg)`
DashboardLayout line 500: `style={{ background: '#0A1018' }}` (desktop soundboard panel) should use `var(--biqc-bg-input)`

test_results.login_page_renders: PASS — Google, Microsoft OAuth buttons, email/password form, Sign in button all visible
test_results.login_inline_error: PASS (after fix) — data-testid='login-error-message' shows 'Invalid email or password. Please check your credentials.' with role='alert'
test_results.theme_toggle_exists: PASS — data-testid='theme-toggle' visible in header with Sun/Moon icon and aria-label
test_results.theme_toggle_works: PASS — Clicking toggle changes data-theme from 'dark' to 'light', --biqc-bg updates to #F0F4F8, body background updates
test_results.theme_persistence: PASS — After reload in light mode, data-theme='light' persists via localStorage
test_results.nav_active_aria_current: PASS — Active nav item (BIQc Overview on /advisor) has aria-current='page'
test_results.mobile_menu_aria_label: PASS — data-testid='mobile-menu-toggle' has aria-label='Open navigation menu'
test_results.pages_no_regression: PASS — /decisions, /revenue, /alerts, /integrations, /settings all load without errors in dark mode

action_items: MEDIUM: Fix DashboardLayout.js — Replace hardcoded `background: '#0F1720'` inline styles with `background: 'var(--biqc-bg)'` on: (1) outer min-h-screen div line ~252, (2) <main> element line ~495, (3) desktop soundboard aside line ~500 (use var(--biqc-bg-input)). Without this, light mode only partially works — body/header/sidebar update but main content area stays dark.
PERSISTING FROM iter_108 — CRITICAL: Fix /api/ingestion/hybrid timeout (Forensic Audit 60s spin). CRITICAL: Fix /api/dsee/scan timeout (Exposure Scan 90s spin).
critical_code_review_comments: DashboardLayout.js: 3 hardcoded inline background colors (#0F1720, #0A1018) override light theme CSS variables — light mode partially broken
DashboardLayout.js: All color CSS vars used in header/sidebar correctly, but not in main content wrapper
tokens.js: textMuted updated to #8B9DB5 — good WCAG AA improvement
LoginSupabase.js: Error handler fixed to catch 'body stream' JS errors from Supabase response double-read

success_rate.frontend: 92% (11/12 Phase 1 features working; light mode partially broken on main content area)

context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 1 design system testing complete. All CSS variables active. Theme toggle works. ARIA labels correct. Login inline error fixed. Key remaining issue: DashboardLayout.js has hardcoded inline background colors (#0F1720) that prevent full light-mode support on main content area — fix those 3 inline styles to use CSS vars. Previous persistent issues (Forensic Audit + Exposure Scan timeouts) still present from iter_108.

login_error_body_stream.symptom: Login with wrong credentials showed 'Failed to execute json on Response: body stream already read'
login_error_body_stream.root_cause: Supabase client internally reads the 400 error response body once. When the error object's .message property is accessed, a secondary attempt to read the already-consumed body stream throws this JS error. The error.message string contained the stream error instead of 'Invalid login credentials'.
login_error_body_stream.fix_applied: Added `msg.includes('body stream') || msg.includes('json')` condition to the error handler in LoginSupabase.js to map all such errors to the user-friendly 'Invalid email or password' message.

light_mode_incomplete.symptom: Light mode toggle: body/header/sidebar go light but main content area stays dark #0F1720
light_mode_incomplete.root_cause: DashboardLayout.js wraps all content in `<div style={{ background: '#0F1720' }}>` and `<main style={{ background: '#0F1720' }}>` with hardcoded colors. These override the body background-color CSS variable change.
light_mode_incomplete.impact: Light mode header + sidebar work correctly. Main content stays dark.
